GenAiFunction.description: Physician Briefing is an Agentforce topic designed to support sales representatives by providing a concise, context‑aware briefing about a physician prior to, or during, a sales meeting. The topic consolidates relevant commercial, engagement, and relationship data so the sales rep can walk into the meeting well‑prepared and aligned to the physician’s interests and history. Prepare effectively for physician meetings Personalize conversations Maximize meeting value by focusing on relevant products, past interactions, and open opportunities
